{{short description|Adult entertainment industry award}}
{{Use mdy dates|date=June 2023}}
{{Infobox award
| name = [[AVN Award]] for Transgender Performer of the Year
| awarded_for = Transgender Performer of the Year
| presenter = [[AVN Media Network]]
| country = [[United States]]
| firstawarded = {{start date and age|2004}}
| lastawarded = 2026
| holder = Aubrey Kate
| website = {{URL|http://avnawards.avn.com}}
}}
The '''[[AVN Award]] for Transgender Performer of the Year''' (previously the '''AVN Award for Transsexual Performer of the Year''') is presented every January in [[Las Vegas, Nevada]] at the [[AVN Awards]] ceremony. It represents the [[Transgender pornography|transgender pornographic film performer]] who has had the best body of work in the previous year. It has been given annually since 2004.<ref name="Vaniity" />

Vaniity was the first winner and first two-time winner; winning in 2004 and 2013. [[Bailey Jay]] was the first back-to-back winner; winning in 2011 and 2012. [[Buck Angel]] is the only [[trans man]] to have won the award, winning in 2007.<ref name=Vaniity>{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/porn-stars/vaniity-220012.html|title= Biography |date=February 7, 2012|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|language=en |access-date=December 10, 2020|url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201210203834/https://avn.com/porn-stars/vaniity-220012.htmll|archive-date= December 10, 2020}}</ref><ref name=TS2004>{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2004-AVN-Awards-Winners-37512.html|title= 2004 AVN Awards Winners |date=January 10, 2004|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|language=en |access-date=December 10, 2020|url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201210204351/https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2004-avn-awards-winners-37512.html|archive-date= December 10, 2020}}</ref><ref name=TS2103>{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2013-transsexual-performer-of-the-year-vaniity-506128.html|title= 2013 Transsexual Performer of the Year: Vaniity |date=February 5, 2013|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|language=en |access-date=December 10, 2020|url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201210204604/https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2013-transsexual-performer-of-the-year-vaniity-506128.html|archive-date= December 10, 2020}}</ref><ref name=BFBuckAngel>{{cite magazine|url=https://www.buzzfeed.com/adambvary/buck-angel-is-a-transgendered-porn-star-but-thats-not-why-he|title=Buck Angel Is A Trans Porn Star, But That's Not Why He's Interesting|author=Adam B. Vary|date=March 12, 2013|magazine=[[BuzzFeed]]|language=en |access-date=December 10, 2020|url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201210205235/https://www.buzzfeed.com/adambvary/buck-angel-is-a-transgendered-porn-star-but-thats-not-why-he|archive-date= December 10, 2020}}</ref><ref name=MGBuckAngel>{{cite magazine|url=https://montrealgazette.com/life/transgender-rights-buck-angel-calls-for-gender-neutral-bathrooms|title=Transgender rights: Buck Angel calls for gender-neutral bathrooms|author=Jillian Page|date=March 11, 2015|magazine=[[Montreal Gazette]]|language=en |access-date=December 10, 2020|url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201210205723/https://montrealgazette.com/life/transgender-rights-buck-angel-calls-for-gender-neutral-bathrooms|archive-date= December 10, 2020}}</ref><ref name=VenusLux>{{cite magazine|url= https://avn.com/business/articles/video/Interview-Transsexual-Performer-of-the-Year-Venus-Lux-626897.html|title=Interview: Transsexual Performer of the Year Venus Lux|date=February 2, 2016|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|language=en |access-date=December 10, 2020|url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201210210223/https://avn.com/business/articles/video/interview-transsexual-performer-of-the-year-venus-lux-626897.html|archive-date= December 10, 2020}}</ref>

Initially, winners were not presented the award on stage, with on-stage presentations first beginning with the 2013 award to Vaniity.<ref name=StageAVN>{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/Transsexual-Reps-AVN-Meet-to-Discuss-Award-Show-Issues-463961.html|title=Transsexual Reps, AVN Meet to Discuss Award Show Issues|date=February 7, 2012|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|language=en |access-date=December 10, 2020|url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201210201739/https://avn.com/business/articles/video/transsexual-reps-avn-meet-to-discuss-award-show-issues-463961.html|archive-date= December 10, 2020}}</ref> As of January 2026, the titleholder is Aubrey Kate.<ref name="AVN 2026" />

==Winners and nominees==
===2000s===
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! Year !! Photo !! Winner !! Nominees
|-
|[[21st AVN Awards|2004]]<ref name=2004Nominees>{{cite magazine|url=http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/05/58/32/55832Nominations.pdf|title=Nominations for 2004 AVN Awards Show|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|language=en |access-date=December 10, 2020|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20031203023916/http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/05/58/32/55832Nominations.pdfl|archive-date= December 3, 2003}}</ref>
||[[File:Vaniity 2010.jpg|240x240px]]|| Vaniity<ref name="Vaniity" /> || <small>[[Gia Darling]]<br />Vo D'Balm<br />Fabiane de la Costa<br />Joanna Jet<br />Nomi X</small>
|-
|[[22nd AVN Awards|2005]]<ref name=2005Nominees>{{cite magazine|url=http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/20/53/72/2053722005_Nominations.pdf|title=Nominations for 2004 AVN Awards Show|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|language=en |access-date=December 10, 2020|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20041211230414/http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/20/53/72/2053722005_Nominations.pdf|archive-date= December 11, 2004}}</ref>||[[File:VickiRichter.jpg|177x177px]]||Vicki Richter<ref name="Richter">{{cite magazine |last=Medoff |first=Marc |date=July 2005 |title=XXX Debauchery in the Desert! |magazine=Genesis |location=Paramus, New Jersey, U.S.A. |publisher=Genesis Publications, Inc. |issue=100 |pages=34–37 |issn=1052-8555 }}</ref> || <small>Vo D'Balm<br />[[Gia Darling]]<br />Danielle Foxxx<br />Joanna Jet<br />Fabiola Mebarek<br />Vaniity</small>
|-
|[[23rd AVN Awards|2006]]<ref name="2006Nominees">{{cite web|url=http://www.avnawards.com/2006nominations.pdf |title=2006 AVN Award Nominees|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20051126013107/http://www.avnawards.com/2006nominations.pdf |archive-date=November 26, 2005 }}</ref>||[[File:Gia Darling 2.jpg|240x240px]]|| [[Gia Darling]]<ref name="winners2006">{{cite web|url=http://www.avnawards.com/2006winners.php |title=2006 AVN Award Winners!!! |date=January 15, 2006 |access-date=January 12, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20060115022600/http://www.avnawards.com/2006winners.php |archive-date=January 15, 2006 }}</ref>|| <small>Joanna Jet<br />Vicki Richter<br />Wendy Williams</small>
|-
|[[24th AVN Awards|2007]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/27/84/74/2784742007UpdatedNominations |title=AVN AWARDS 2007 NOMINEES |access-date=September 27, 2014 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070423104247/http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/27/84/74/2784742007UpdatedNominations |archive-date=April 23, 2007 }}</ref>||[[File:Buckangel cowboy (cropped).JPG|160px]]|| [[Buck Angel]]<ref name="winners2007">{{cite web|url=http://www.avn.com/index.php?Primary_Navigation=Articles&Action=View_Article&Content_ID=281743 |title=2007 AVN Award Winners Announced |author=AVN |date=January 16, 2007 |access-date=January 9, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070807230746/http://www.avn.com/index.php?Primary_Navigation=Articles&Action=View_Article&Content_ID=281743 |archive-date=August 7, 2007 }}</ref>|| <small>[[Gia Darling]]<br />Danielle Foxxx<br />Joanna Jet<br />Allanah Starr<br />Holly Sweet<br />Vaniity<br />Wendy Williams<br /></small>
|-
|[[25th AVN Awards|2008]]<ref>{{cite news|title=The 2008 AVN Awards Nominations |url=http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2008Nominations.pdf |access-date=August 21, 2014 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20080227073556/http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2008Nominations.pdf |archive-date=February 27, 2008 }}</ref>||[[File:Miss Allanah Starr.jpg|240x240px]]|| Allanah Starr<ref name="2008winners">{{cite web|url=http://www.avn.com/video/articles/2759.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20080404082611/http://www.avn.com/video/articles/2759.html|archive-date=April 4, 2008|title=2008 AVN Awards Winners Announced|author=Jared Rutter|work=AVN.com|access-date=January 17, 2015}}</ref><ref name=winners>{{cite web|url=http://www.xbiz.com/news/news_piece.php?id=88772&mi=all&q=2008+avn|title=AVN Announces 2008 Adult Movie Awards Winners|author=Steve Javors|work=Xbiz.com|access-date=January 17, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150417010452/http://www.xbiz.com/news/news_piece.php?id=88772&mi=all&q=2008+avn|archive-date=April 17, 2015}}</ref> ||<small>[[Buck Angel]]<br />Khloe Hart<br />Sexy Jade<br />Kourtney<br />[[Yasmin Lee]]<br />Carla Novaes<br />Thays Schiavinato<br />Vaniity<br />Vicki Richter<br />Wendy Williams<br /></small>
|-
|[[26th AVN Awards|2009]]<ref>{{cite news|title=NOMINATIONS 2009 AVN Adult Movie Awards |url=http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2009_AVN_NOMINATIONS_11_25_08.pdf |access-date=August 18, 2014 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090105164506/http://www.avnawards.com/pdf/2009_AVN_NOMINATIONS_11_25_08.pdf |archive-date=January 5, 2009 }}</ref>||[[File:Wendy Williams 3.jpg|241x241px]]|| Wendy Williams<ref name=winners2009>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/2009-AVN-Award-Winners-Announced-56551.html/|last=Sullivan|first=David|date=January 11, 2009|title=2009 AVN Award-Winners Announced|magazine=Adult Video News|access-date=December 20, 2015|archive-date=August 27, 2016|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160827161551/https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2009-avn-award-winners-announced-56551.html|url-status=dead}}</ref>
|| <small>[[Buck Angel]]<br />Brittany Coxxx<br />Natassia Dreams<br />Jesse Flores <br />Foxxy <br />Jessica Host <br />Yasmine Lee <br />Vicki Richter<br />Holly Sweet <br /></small>
|}

===2010s===
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! Year !! Photo !! Winner !! Nominees
|-
|[[27th AVN Awards|2010]]<ref>{{cite news|title=2010 NOMINEES |url=http://avnawards.avn.com/nominees/ |access-date=August 8, 2014 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20100304153045/http://avnawards.avn.com/nominees/ |archive-date=March 4, 2010 }}</ref>||[[File:Kimber James Erotica Los Angeles 2009 (1).jpg|213x213px]]||Kimber James<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/2010-AVN-Award-Winners-Announced-378238.html|title=2010 AVN Award Winners Announced|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|access-date=December 31, 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201211015506/https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2010-avn-award-winners-announced-378238.html|archive-date=December 11, 2020}}</ref> || <small>[[Buck Angel]]<br />Celeste (IV) (Trans)<br />Sexy Jade<br />Jesse<br />Joanna Jet<br />Olivia Love<br />Anna Paula Samadat <br />Hazel Tucker<br />Wendy Williams</small>
|-
|[[28th AVN Awards|2011]]<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/2011_nominations2.pdf|title=2011 Nominations|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|access-date=August 8, 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130329112839/http://avnawards.avn.com/2011_nominations2.pdf|archive-date=March 29, 2013}}</ref>||rowspan=2| [[File:Bailey Jay at AVN Awards 2011 1 (crop).jpg|213x213px]]|| rowspan="2" |[[Bailey Jay]]<ref>{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/avn-announces-the-winners-of-the-2011-avn-awards-421782.html|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2011 AVN Awards|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|access-date=December 11, 2020|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201211021937/https://avn.com/business/articles/video/avn-announces-the-winners-of-the-2011-avn-awards-421782.html|archive-date=December 11, 2020}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/avn-announces-the-2012-avn-award-winners-461715.html|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2012 AVN Awards|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|access-date=December 11, 2020|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20201211022354/https://avn.com/business/articles/video/avn-announces-the-2012-avn-award-winners-461715.html|archive-date=December 11, 2020}}</ref>||<small>Morgan Bailey <br />Hera C <br />Celeste<br />Natalia Coxxx <br />Amy Daly<br />Jesse Flores<br />Foxxy <br />[[Mia Isabella]]<br />Kimber James<br />Hazel Tucker<br />Wendy Williams</small>
|-
|[[29th AVN Awards|2012]]<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/2012_AVN_Awards_nominations.pdf|title=2012 Nominations|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|access-date=August 6, 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130329124455/http://avnawards.avn.com/2012_AVN_Awards_nominations.pdf|archive-date=March 29, 2013}}</ref>||<small>Celeste<br />Amy Daly <br />Morgan Bailey <br />Jesse Flores <br />[[Mia Isabella]]<br />Joanna Jet<br />[[Yasmin Lee]]<br />Madison Montag <br />Domino Presley <br />Aly Sinclair <br />Brittany St. Jordan <br />Juliette Stray <br />Hazel Tucker<br />Wendy Williams</small>
|-
|[[30th AVN Awards|2013]]<ref>{{cite web|title=2013 AVN Awards Nominees |url=http://avnawards.avn.com/2013_nominations.pdf |access-date=August 6, 2014 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130328092725/http://avnawards.avn.com/2013_nominations.pdf |archive-date=March 28, 2013 }}</ref> ||[[File:Vaniity 2010.jpg|240x240px]]||Vaniity<ref name="Vaniity" /> || <small>Celeste<br />Amy Daly<br />Danni Daniels<br />Jessica Fox<br />Joanna Jet<br />Eva Lin<br />[[Venus Lux]]<br />Sunshyne Monroe<br />Aly Sinclair<br />Brittany St. Jordan<br />Tiffany Starr<br />Wendy Summers<br />Sarina Valentina<br />Wendy Williams</small>
|-
|[[31st AVN Awards|2014]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/page/3 |title=2014 AVN Award Nominees |access-date=August 6, 2014 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140126094717/http://avnawards.avn.com/page/3 |archive-date=January 26, 2014 }}</ref> ||[[File:Exxxotica AC 2014 - Eva Lin.jpg|240x240px]]||Eva Lin<ref name="winners2014">{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2014-AVN-Awards-544448.html|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2014 AVN Awards|magazine=Adult Video News|date=January 19, 2014|access-date=January 19, 2014|archive-date=February 1, 2016|archive-url=https://archive.today/20160201103626/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2014-AVN-Awards-544448.html|url-status=dead}}</ref> || <small>[[Buck Angel]]<br />Natassia Dreams<br />Danika Dreamz<br />Jesse Flores<br />Jessica Fox<br />Foxxy<br />Kelli Lox<br />[[Venus Lux]]<br />Jane Marie<br />Carmen Moore<br />Tiffany Starr<br />Wendy Summers<br />Sarina Valentina<br />Vaniity</small>
|-
|[[32nd AVN Awards|2015]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/4 |title=2015 AVN Award Nominees |access-date=November 21, 2014 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20141230202705/http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/4 |archive-date=December 30, 2014  }}</ref> ||rowspan=2| [[File:Venus Lux 2015.jpg|240x240px]]|| rowspan="2" |[[Venus Lux]]<ref name="AVNwinnerslist2015">{{cite web|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2015 AVN Awards|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2015-AVN-Awards-585973.html|website=AVN.com|publisher=Adult Video News|access-date=January 25, 2015|archive-date=February 6, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150206165744/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2015-AVN-Awards-585973.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref name="Winners">{{cite web |url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2016-AVN-Awards-620416.html |title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2016 AVN Awards |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=January 23, 2016 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 24, 2016 |archive-date=January 26, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160126155756/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2016-AVN-Awards-620416.html |url-status=dead }}</ref>||<small>Jonelle Brooks<br />Chanel Couture<br />James Darling<br />Jessy Dubai<br />Foxxy<br />Khloe Hart<br />Kelly Klaymour<br />Eva Lin<br />Kelli Lox<br />Chelsea Poe<br />Tyra Scott<br />Tiffany Starr<br />Vaniity<br />Wendy Williams</small>
|-
|[[33rd AVN Awards|2016]]<ref>{{cite web|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/8 |title=2016 AVN AWARD NOMINATIONS |access-date=November 20, 2015 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151120162020/http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/8 |archive-date=November 20, 2015 }}</ref> ||<small>Jonelle Brooks<br />Delia DeLions<br />Jessy Dubai<br />Foxxy<br />Vixxen Goddess<br />Sienna Grace<br />Khloe Hart<br />Aubrey Kate<br />Kelli Lox<br />Kylie Maria<br />Carla Novaes<br />Holly Parker<br />Chelsea Poe<br />Tyra Scott</small>
|-
|[[34th AVN Awards|2017]]<ref name="nominees2017">{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees |title=AVN Awards 2017 Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=November 17, 2016|magazine=Adult Video News|access-date=July 12, 2017|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170113172207/https://avn.com/awards/nominees |archive-date=January 13, 2017}}</ref>||rowspan=2| [[File:Aubrey Kate.png|213x213px]]|| rowspan="2" |Aubrey Kate<ref name="Winners2017">{{cite web |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2017-avn-award-winners-announced-712151.html |title=2017 AVN Award Winners Announced |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=January 21, 2017 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 22, 2017}}</ref><ref name="Winners2018">{{cite web |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2018-avn-award-winners-announced-759869.html |title=2018 AVN Award Winners Announced |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=January 28, 2018 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=February 4, 2018}}</ref> ||<small>Michelle Austin<br />Aspen Brooks<br />Jessy Dubai<br />Jessica Fox<br />Foxxy<br />Nina Lawless<br />Kelli Lox<br />[[Venus Lux]]<br />Chelsea Marie<br />Sunshyne Monroe<br />Chelsea Poe<br />Domino Presley<br />Isabella Sorrenti<br />Stefani Special</small>
|-
|[[35th AVN Awards|2018]]<ref>{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees|website=AVN.com|access-date=December 10, 2020|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20171226192244/https://avn.com/awards/nominees|archive-date=December 26, 2017|title=Fan Awards }}</ref>||<small>Foxxy<br />Dicky Johnson<br />Casey Kisses<br />[[Venus Lux]]<br />Natalie Mars<br />Tori Mayes<br />Marissa Minx<br />Mandy Mitchell<br />Sunshyne Monroe<br />Chanel Santini<br />Alexa Scout<br />Stefani Special<br />Shiri Trap<br />Freya Wynn</small>
|-
|[[36th AVN Award|2019]]<ref name="nominees">{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees|title=2019 Nominees AVN Awards|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=January 28, 2019}}</ref>|| ||Chanel Santini<ref name="Winners2019">{{cite magazine |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2019-avn-813648.html|title=2019 AVN Award Winners Announced|date=January 27, 2019 |magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>||<small>Shiri Allwood<br />Michelle Austin<br />Aspen Brooks<br />Kayleigh Coxx<br />Korra Del Rio<br />Foxxy<br />Aubrey Kate<br />Khloe Kay<br />Lena Kelly<br />Casey Kisses<br />Annabelle Lane<br />Natalie Mars<br />Domino Presley<br />Tyler St. Syn</small>
|}

===2020s===
{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! Year !! Photo !! Winner !! Nominees
|-
|[[37th AVN Awards|2020]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees|title=2020 Nominees AVN Awards|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=January 26, 2020}}</ref>|| [[File:NatalieMars.jpg|160px]] ||Natalie Mars<ref name="AVN2020">{{cite web|url= https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2020-avn-award-winners-announced-863917.html|title=2020 AVN Award Winners Announced |date=January 25, 2020 |magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>||<small>Shiri Allwood <br />Kayleigh Coxx <br />Korra del Rio <br />Ella Hollywood <br />Aubrey Kate <br />Khloe Kay <br />Lena Kelly <br />Casey Kisses <br />Lianna Lawson <br />Chelsea Marie <br />Marissa Minx <br />Ryder Monroe <br />Chanel Santini <br />Daisy Taylor</small>
|-
|[[38th AVN Awards|2021]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2021_nominees|title=2021 Nominees AVN Awards|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=November 29, 2020}}</ref>|| [[File:Aubrey Kate.png|213x213px]]||Aubrey Kate<ref name="AVN2021">{{cite web|url= https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2021-avn-award-winners-announced-895732.html|title=2021 AVN Award Winners Announced |date=January 23, 2021|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>|| <small>Shiri Allwood <br />Aspen Brooks <br />Kayleigh Coxx <br />Korra Del Rio <br />Natassia Dreams <br />Foxxy <br />Jenna Gargles <br />Ella Hollywood <br />Khloe Kay <br />Casey Kisses <br />Natalie Mars<br />Ryder Monroe <br />Lena Moon <br />Daisy Taylor</small>
|-
|[[39th AVN Awards|2022]]<ref>{{cite web |title=2022 Nominees |url=https://avn.com/awards/2022_nominees |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=29 March 2025 |language=en}}</ref>|| ||Casey Kisses<ref>{{cite web |title=2022 AVN Award Winners Announced |url=https://avn.com/news/video/2022-avn-award-winners-announced-172729 |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=29 March 2025}}</ref>||<small>Melanie Brooks<br />Erica Cherry<br />Korra Del Rio<br />Aubrey Kate<br />Nicole Knight<br />Lianna Lawson<br />Natalie Mars<br />Ivory Mayhem<br />Lena Moon<br />Roxxie Moth<br />[[Angelina Please]]<br />Emma Rose<br />Daisy Taylor<br />Crystal Thayer</small>
|-
|[[40th AVN Awards|2023]]<ref>{{cite web |title=2023 Nominees |url=https://avn.com/awards/2023_nominees |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=29 March 2025}}</ref>|| ||Emma Rose<ref>{{cite web |title=2023 AVN Award Winners Announced |url=https://avn.com/news/video/2023-avn-award-winners-announced-174557 |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=29 March 2025}}</ref>||<small>Janie Blade<br />Erica Cherry<br />Korra Del Rio<br />Ariel Demure<br />Jessy Dubai<br />Khloe Kay<br />Kasey Kei<br />Pixi Lust<br />Cherry Mavrik<br />Eva Maxim<br />Lola Morena<br />Crystal Thayer<br />Jade Venus<br />Izzy Wilde</small>
|-
|[[41st AVN Awards|2024]]<ref>{{cite web |title=2024 Nominees |url=https://avn.com/awards/2024_nominees |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=29 March 2025}}</ref>|| ||Emma Rose<ref>{{cite web |title=2024 AVN Award Winners Announced |url=https://avn.com/news/video/2024-avn-award-winners-announced-176800 |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=29 March 2025}}</ref>||<small>Valeria Atreides<br />Zariah Aura<br />Asia Belle<br />Erica Cherry<br />Ariel Demure<br />Tori Easton<br />Gracie Jane<br />[[Brittney Kade]]<br />Kasey Kei<br />Eva Maxim<br />Lola Morena<br />Daisy Taylor<br />Jade Venus<br />Izzy Wilde</small>
|-
|2025<ref>{{cite web |title=2025 Nominees |url=https://avn.com/awards/2025_nominees |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=29 March 2025}}</ref>|| [[File:Brittney Kade.png|160px]] ||[[Brittney Kade]]<ref>{{cite web |title=2025 AVN Award Winners Announced |url=https://avn.com/news/video/2025-avn-award-winners-announced-178865 |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=29 March 2025}}</ref>||<small>Zariah Aura<br />Ariel Demure<br />Ember Fiera<br />Angellica Good<br />Gracie Jane<br />Kasey Kei<br />Leilani Li<br />Eva Maxim<br />Lola Morena<br />Eros Orisha<br />Amanda Riley<br />Emma Rose<br />Jade Venus<br />Izzy Wilde</small>
|-
|2026<ref>{{cite web |title=2026 Nominees |url=https://avn.com/awards/2026_nominees |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=31 March 2026}}</ref>|| [[File:Aubrey Kate.png|213x213px]] ||Aubrey Kate<ref name="AVN 2026">{{cite web |title=2026 AVN Award Winners Announced |url=https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971 |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=31 March 2026}}</ref>||<small>Zariah Aura<br />Ariel Demure<br />Victoria Grant<br />[[Brittney Kade]]<br />Aubrey Kate<br />Kasey Kei<br />Leilani Li<br />Blake Lovely<br />Avery Lust<br />Eva Maxim<br />Lola Morena<br />Andylynn Payne<br />Autumn Rain<br />Grazyeli Silva<br />Jade Venus</small>
|-
|rowspan=14 |2026<ref>{{Cite web|title=2026 AVN Award Nominees Announced|url=https://avn.com/awards/2026_nominees|website=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|title=2026 AVN Award Winners Announced|url=https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971|website=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>
|rowspan=14 align=center|
|rowspan=14 align=center|'''Aubrey Kate'''
|align=center|Zariah Aura
|-
|align=center|Ariel Demure
|-
|align=center|Victoria Grant
|-
|align=center|Brittney Kade
|-
|align=center|Kasey Kei
|-
|align=center|Leilani Li
|-
|align=center|Blake Lovely
|-
|align=center|Avery Lust
|-
|align=center|Eva Maxim
|-
|align=center|Lola Morena
|-
|align=center|Andylynn Payne
|-
|align=center|Autumn Rain
|-
|align=center|Grazyeli Silva
|-
|align=center|Jade Venus
|}

==See also==
* [[AVN Award for Male Performer of the Year]]
* [[AVN Award for Female Performer of the Year]]
* [[AVN Award for Male Foreign Performer of the Year]]

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
* {{official website|http://www.avnawards.com}}

{{AVN}}

[[Category:AVN Awards|Transgender Performer of the Year]]
[[Category:Awards established in 2004]]
[[Category:Awards for actresses]]
[[Category:Film acting awards]]
[[Category:Transgender erotica]]
